title: MAGEB16 as an epigenetic timing regulator linking X-chromosome biology to neurodevelopmental vulnerability in ASD
abstract: Integrative analysis proposes MAGEB16 as X-linked epigenetic susceptibility factor for ASD via DNA methylation-regulated developmental timing.
summary: Proposes MAGEB16 as X-linked epigenetic susceptibility factor for ASD via DNA methylation-regulated developmental timing.
